subcodes.title: Prayer spoken at children's dinner, Cannongate School in Edinburgh, ca. 1913-01-09
subcodes.first_line: O Thou Kind God! These beloved children are created by Thy Mighty Hand. They are the signs of Thy Omnipotence.
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @education of children; moral education, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @symbolism
